_comment: Edit the entries array to update teaching, tutorials, workshops, service, and reviewing.

entries.title: EECI PhD course: Neural Networks for Optimal Control
entries.institution: IGSC (International Graduate School on Control) at EPFL, Switzerland
entries.description: Lecturer and organizer of a PhD course on neural network-based optimal control, covering closed-loop parametrizations, nonlinear stability tools, and performance-boosting methods for designing high-performance controllers with embedded stability and robustness guarantees.

entries.title: Distributed MPC course
entries.description: Lecturer and organizer of a course on distributed model predictive control for large-scale and networked systems, covering cooperative and non-cooperative DMPC algorithms, distributed optimization, terminal ingredients, and distributed system-level synthesis.

entries.title: Fondamenti di Automatica
entries.description: Teaching assistant for "Fondamenti di Automatica", supporting a course on dynamical systems, stability, transfer functions, frequency-domain analysis, and feedback control.

entries.title: Finite elements course
entries.institution: Fondazione Istituto Tecnico Superiore per le Nuove Tecnologie della Vita, Bergamo, Italy
entries.description: Instructor, Finite Element Analysis course. Taught practical sessions on finite element analysis, guiding students through numerical modelling, simulation workflows, and the interpretation of computational results for engineering problems.

entries.title: Distributed MPC for Multi-Agent Systems
entries.description: Organizer and speaker of the ECC 2026 workshop Distributed MPC for Multi-Agent Systems, focused on scalable, safe, and real-time DMPC methods for multi-agent systems, including distributed optimization, learning-accelerated DMPC, and contract-based coordination.

entries.title: Neural Network control with stability and performance guarantees
entries.description: Organizer and speaker of the ECC 2024 pre-conference workshop Neural Network Control with Stability and Performance Guarantees, focused on NN-based control methods that preserve closed-loop stability, robustness, and performance guarantees.

entries.title: Reviewing and academic service
entries.description: Served as reviewer for over 50 submissions to leading international control journals and conferences, including CDC, ECC, ACC, L-CSS, IEEE TAC, IEEE TCST, and Automatica.
